meanings.definition: collapse by releasing contained air or gas
release contained air or gas from
reduce or lessen the size or importance of
examples: The bad review of his work deflated his self-confidence
The new measures deflated the economy

meanings.definition: reduce or cut back the amount or availability of, creating a decline in value or prices
become deflated or flaccid, as by losing air

examples: left us fatigued and deflated spiritually
